name: Scopus Researcher
features: Local LLM via Ollama (privacy-first, offline-capable)
Auto hardware detection (CPU/RAM/GPU incl. NVIDIA RTX & Quadro)
Auto-tune: pick best model + num_ctx + workers for your machine
4 long-content strategies (max_perf, auto_ctx, chunked, truncate)
Zero-touch installer: detects machine + installs Ollama + model
Config Health dashboard + one-click Test buttons in Settings
Polished long-content strategy labels (no more A/B/C/D codes)
Pre-install preflight: warns if disk/RAM are below minimums
Bundled LICENSE, CHANGELOG, QUICKSTART, TROUBLESHOOT docs
Support contact wired in installer + UI (archencontact96@gmail.com)
Auto-install Git (winget) + Claude CLI (bundled Node) by default
config.json now stores absolute claude/gemini paths when installed by us
First-run wizard walks new users through Scopus + AI provider setup
Diagnostic bundle export (.zip with logs + redacted config) for support
In-app update checker + banner notification when newer version available
HTTP/HTTPS proxy support (corporate / university networks)
Settings utility buttons: restart server, open folders, backup config
Crash-recovery loop in LitReview.bat (auto-restart up to 3x)
Auto-backup config.json on every save (config.json.bak)
Path-traversal middleware: rejects malformed pids before reaching handlers
Light/dark theme toggle in header (CSS variables + persisted preference)
PDF download: 12-source chain incl. Crossref/PMC/EuropePMC/CORE/citation_pdf_url
Browser User-Agent + per-host rate limiter rescues MDPI/AMS/Frontiers/IEEE OA
Cookie warmup pattern bypasses MDPI/Atypon bot walls for OA papers
Comprehensive QA suite (74 tests) catches regressions before ship
5-agent specialist team (.claude/agents/) for layer-aligned dev workflow
Fix Excel export HTTP 500: _xlsx_safe() strips control chars from AI content; covers all 4 xlsx endpoints
Fix MDPI/Water/Sensors/JMSE paper downloads on fresh machines: Cloudflare cookie warmup (mdpi.com homepage) + Chrome 126 client hints in _BROWSER_HEADERS
License-clean PDF engine: PyMuPDF (AGPL) replaced with pypdf (BSD) for closed-source distribution
Update checker points to official GitHub Releases repo (litreview-releases)
